name: hud_sensor_init_mission_id_and_flags
description: HudSensorTracker::InitMissionIdAndFlags stores mission id and flags, clears the ZBD path when the mission id is nonzero, and returns one.
binary_safe_evidence: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?InitMissionIdAndFlags@HudSensorTracker@@QAEHHH@Z at 0x417770 passed with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 4 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 43 bytes and the VC object symbol is 48 bytes with 5 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed.
The native smoke validates mission id, mission flags, return value, GetMissionId, and ZBD path clearing when the mission id is nonzero.
